cases.input: Run the business-review skill for 2026-Q2. The vault has a Memory/kpi-ledger.md with rows for visitors, signup-rate, trial-to-paid, MRR, churn-rate, and pipeline-value; Company/strategy.md with the quarter's targets; and a few deliverable data/baseline.json snapshots under Projects/ and Content/. No prior review snapshot exists. Produce the full rollup.
must: presents one SCORECARD table covering every metric in the ledger, not just the ones that improved
shows each metric as baseline to current to target with a direction of on-track, behind, regressed, or stale
every scorecard number traces to a real ledger row by its source, and any untraceable metric is marked stale rather than estimated
leads the narrative with what is behind and names exactly three evidence-linked wins plus what stalled
gives exactly three do-next moves, each with a named metric, a target, and a concrete skill to run
invents no traffic, revenue, or conversion figures and adds no new row to the ledger

dimensions.name: honesty about misses
dimensions.desc: the read leads with what is behind, surfaces every regression by name, and never buries a miss under the wins

dimensions.name: evidence traceability
dimensions.desc: each scorecard number points at a real ledger row and each area movement cites the specific deliverable baseline.json path that drove it

dimensions.name: rollup clarity
dimensions.desc: the scorecard reads at a glance, baseline to current to target with a clear direction, and every metric is present

dimensions.name: decision usefulness
dimensions.desc: the three do-next moves each carry a measurable goal and a named skill, so a reader knows exactly what to run next

dimensions.name: no invented numbers
dimensions.desc: nothing is estimated or fabricated; gaps are marked stale and surfaced rather than filled with a plausible figure

cases.input: Run the business-review skill for 2026-Q3 in the same vault, where the 2026-Q2 review already wrote Operations/reviews/2026-Q2-business-review/data/baseline.json. Lead with the trend versus last review, then the full rollup. The ledger has a stale row (no fresh entry this period) for trial-to-paid.
must: opens with a TREND section comparing this period against the prior snapshot before the scorecard, naming which metrics improved, held, or regressed
marks the trial-to-paid metric stale and surfaces the gap instead of estimating a current value
keeps the SCORECARD complete with every metric and a source row pointing at the ledger
writes the by-area read across acquisition, conversion, retention, content, and pipeline with a cited deliverable path per area
leaves Memory/kpi-ledger.md unchanged and appends only a one-line Daily Activity entry for the review
keeps the narrative to exactly three wins and the do-next to exactly three measurable moves

dimensions.name: honesty about misses
dimensions.desc: the stale metric and any regression are stated plainly up top, with the trend versus last period leading rather than the wins

dimensions.name: evidence traceability
dimensions.desc: the trend ties back to the prior baseline.json, scorecard rows trace to the ledger, and area movement cites deliverable paths

dimensions.name: rollup clarity
dimensions.desc: trend then scorecard reads in a clean order, every metric present, the stale row visibly flagged not silently dropped

dimensions.name: decision usefulness
dimensions.desc: the do-next moves respond to what the trend and misses revealed, each with a metric, target, and skill to run

dimensions.name: no invented numbers
dimensions.desc: the stale metric is left unfilled and flagged; no current value is back-solved from the target or the prior period
